turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi. My mother had eye surgery — cataract — 5 days ago at your clinic. The eye patch was removed yesterday and her vision is very blurry. Is that normal?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I can understand your worry. Could you give me her name?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Post-cataract blurry vision on day 5 can have various causes and really requires assessment by the ophthalmologist rather than a general helpline response from me. I'd be doing a disservice to guess.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Please don't decide based on what I say — our ophthalmic team or nursing staff are far better placed to advise. Let me connect you to our staff right now so they can assess urgency.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Connecting immediately — please hold for our staff.
